title: Tealium Visitor Profile
description: Schema for a visitor profile record returned by the Tealium Visitor Profile API or Visitor Privacy API.

audiences.description: Audience memberships — key is audience ID or name, value is boolean membership

badges.description: Badge memberships — key is badge ID or name, value is boolean

metrics.description: Numeric metric attribute values keyed by attribute ID or name

properties.description: String property attribute values keyed by attribute ID or name

flags.description: Boolean flag attribute values keyed by attribute ID or name

dates.description: Date attribute values keyed by attribute ID or name

currentVisit.description: Visit-scoped attribute values for the current session
